Template.SubjectPart: [NACC Data Platform] Form Deletion Request Successfully Processed
Template.TextPart:
Dear {{first_name}},

Deletion request for visit/form {{delete_request_label}} has been successfully processed for {{center_name}}.

List of deleted forms/modules:
{{deleted_visits}}

If you need to resubmit this visit, please make sure to resubmit all the associated modules listed above (if any).

You can verify the results on the NACC Data Platform ({{portal_url}}).

If you have any questions or need assistance, contact NACC support at naccdata.org/support.
Template.HtmlPart:
Dear {{first_name}},

Deletion request for visit/form {{delete_request_label}} has been successfully processed for {{center_name}}.

List of deleted forms/modules:
{{deleted_visits}}

If you need to resubmit this visit, please make sure to resubmit all the associated modules listed above (if any).

You can verify the results on the NACC Data Platform.

If you have any questions or need assistance, contact NACC Support at naccdata.org/support.
